ratings.comment: Made this lab very interesting and fun. I learned so much that I will be using in the future. She does expect high quality from all her students, but is more than willing to help you if you need it.

Prof. Masters has great energy. She makes class interesting and fun. You will not be bored in her class. However, I found her to be a tough grader, taking points off for not explaining enough and other little things. Overall, great professor!

Wow, Every engineer should take this class.  She has brought in great speakers and introduced topics worthy for stimulating discussion.  Respects all the students, and is prepared for class.  Also, she keeps our belly full with cookies and brownies.
Cool teacher. She brings cookies and brownies to class. She is very friendly. Be sure not to feed her legumes.
Did that last guy mention if he deserved a better grade?  I did great in her class, maybe she knew I thought she was the nicest (and hottest) prof I'd ever met.
